case_title: DE BOER, ELLEN vs. RODMAN, ALLISON IND/DBA RODMAN'S METRO FOODS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE BOER, ELLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODMAN, ALLISON IND/DBA RODMAN'S METRO FOODS $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,480.00
REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE BOER, ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT RODMAN, ALLISON IND/DBA RODMAN'S METRO FOODS
